nodes.itemHTML: • lovely-enginestars2 - A tool that makes setting up and using Love2d easier and with Moonscript support
• go-andotpstars4 - A CLI program to encrypt/decrypt andOTPstars3.1k files. Can be used as library as well.
• hooflistars1 - Generate PlantUML diagrams from Chrome or Firefox network inspections.
• columnstars711 - High-performance, columnar, embeddable in-memory store with bitmap indexing and transactions.
• Ergostars1.3k - Modern server that's portable and designed around specifications (bleeding-edge IRCv3 support). (sourcestars1.3k)
• LibertaCasa - Privacy endorsing community serving as a safe and open space for the discussion of various topics.
• pastystars27 - Pasty is a fast and lightweight code pasting server. (Demo) MIT Go
• Ergo - Modern IRCv3 server written in Go, combining the features of an ircd, a services framework, and a bouncer. (Source Codestars1.3k) MIT Go
• EspoCRM - CRM with a frontend designed as a single page application, and a REST API. (Demo, Source Codestars771) GPL-3.0 PHP
• Calendly — Calendly is the tool for connecting and scheduling meetings. Free plan provides 1 Calendar connection per user and Unlimited meetings. Desktop and Mobile apps also provided.
• Flutter Flow — Build your Flutter App UI without writing a single line of code. Also has a Firebase integration. Free plan includes full access to UI Builder and Free templates.

• GB Studio - Drag and drop game creator with simple, no knowledge required, visual scripting.
    • Resources to get started
    • Dedicated Discord
• gbtstars476 - Go Bullet Train is a very customizable prompt builder inspired by Bullet Train that runs much faster. Includes many different status cars.

• GBDKstars527 - Maintained and modernized GBDK (Game Boy Development Kit) powered by an updated version of the SDCC toolchain. Provides a C compiler, assembler, linker and a set of libraries.
    • API docs: Getting Started
    • Examplesstars105
    • Documentation, links and tools
• Silk.NETstars671 - C# bindings for Vulkan and others. [MIT]
• Tetrisstars2 - Complete Tetris disassembly.
• thedev.id — A free thedev.id subdomain for developers.
• Google Keep Clone with Vue + Firestorestars70 - Google Keep clone with Vue and Firestore written in TypeScript.
• Vue 3 Shopping Cartstars6 - A Shopping cart example using Vue 3, Vite, daisyUI and Pinia.
• statically.io — CDN for Git repos (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket), WordPress-related assets and images
• seriousstars0 - Includes command exit status and git status decorations.
• sandboxdstars209 - Speed up your .zshrc & shell startup with lazy-loading by only running setup commands (e.g. eval "$(rbenv init -)", etc) when you need them.
• manistars6 - CLI tool to help you manage multiple repositories.
• Svoj Podcast - Podcast about the latest news in programming, IT and technologies. Hosted by Yurii Sydorets and Alex Poddiachyi
• fzf-itstars1 - Make any command interactive wrapping it with FZF functionality.
• ugitstars203 - Lets you undo your last git operation.
• zawstars498 - ZSH anything.el-like widget.

• A Self-Study Course In Block-Cipher Cryptanalysis - This paper attempts to organize the existing literature of block-cipher cryptanalysis in a way that students can use to learn cryptanalytic techniques and ways to break algorithms, by Bruce Schneier.
• bcrypt-Node.js - Native implementation of bcrypt for Node.js.
• crypticostars1.1k - Easy-to-use encryption system utilizing RSA and AES for JavaScript.
• cryptojsstars313 - Provide standard and secure cryptographic algorithms for Node.js.
• forgestars3.9k - Native implementation of TLS in JavaScript and tools to write crypto-based and network-heavy webapps.
• IronNode - Transform encryption library, a variant of proxy re-encryption, for encrypting to users or groups, and easily adding strong data controls to Node.js apps.
• js-naclstars466 - Pure-JavaScript High-level API to Emscripten-compiled libsodium routines.
• jsencryptstars5.1k - JavaScript library to perform OpenSSL RSA Encryption, Decryption, and Key Generation.
• JShashesstars631 - Fast and dependency-free cryptographic hashing library for Node.js and browsers (supports MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512, RIPEMD, HMAC).

• jsThemis - JavaScript wrapper on Themis. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).

• milagro-crypto-jsstars11 - MCJS is a standards compliant JavaScript cryptographic library with no external dependencies except for the random seed source. Compatible for Node.js and browser. It supports RSA, ECDH, ECIES, ECDSA, AES-GCM, SHA2, SHA3, Pairing-Based Cryptography and New Hope.
• node.bcrypt.jsstars5.9k - bcrypt for Node.js.
• sjclstars6.5k - Stanford JavaScript Crypto Library.

• ObjC Themis - ObjC wrapper on Themis for iOS and macOS. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).
• OpenSSLstars38 - Swift OpenSSL for macOS and Linux.
• Swift-Sodiumstars404 - Swift interface to the Sodium library for common crypto operations for iOS and macOS.

• SwiftThemis - Swift wrapper on Themis for iOS and macOS. High level crypto library for storing data (AES), secure messaging (ECC + ECDSA / RSA + PSS + PKCS#7) and session-oriented, forward secrecy data exchange (ECDH key agreement, ECC & AES encryption).
• show-pathstars0 - Provides a function shows the $PATH line by line.
• nonnominandus/pdbtbxstars8 PDBTBX - PDB/mmCIF libary in Rust.

• Spawn - Cloud service for creating instant database copies for development and CI. No more local db installs, instant recovery to arbitrary save points, isolated copies for each feature branch or test. Instant provisioning regardless of database size.
• Recaf - Bytecode editor.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Platforms and Software Resources

Geospatial Data and Visualization
nodes.itemHTML: • CARTO - CARTO is a world leading Location Intelligence platform, enabling organizations to host & use spatial data and enable analysis for more efficient delivery routes, better behavioural marketing, strategic store placements, and much more.
• ublestars65 - Lightweight Bluetooth Low Energy driver written in pure python for micropython.
• MCArchive - Archives old, lost and forgotten Minecraft mods. Various other mods and stuff can be found on their Discord.
• Minecraft Archive Project - Huge archive containing Minecraft mods, worlds, resource packs and many other resources (even forum posts!).
• MCVersions - Archives most Minecraft jars.
• BetaCraft Archive - Archives some missing Minecraft server jars.
• MCPC+ Archive - Archive with some MCPC+ versions.
• CraftBukkit Archive - Archives many CraftBukkit versions.
• Quilt - A powerful fork of the Fabric project.
• Rift - A Mod Loader for 1.13-1.13.2 (even Snapshots).
• VoxelMap - Formerly known as Zan's Minimap, providing basic map and radar functionality.
• WTHIT - Shows the block currently looked at (Newer version of Hwyla).
• Hwyla - Shows the block currently looked at (Newer version of Waila).
• WorldInfo - Shows the block currently looked at (Waila for Rift).
• Waila - Shows the block currently looked at (The original Waila project).
• Block Helper - Shows the block currently looked at (Legacy alternative of Waila for older Minecraft versions than 1.6).
• BDCraft - Various comic-style resource and sound packs, even for many mods, Bedrock Edition, and Terraria!
• LB Photo Realism Reload - Successor of the LB Photo Realism texture pack making Minecraft look more realistic.
• Default Dark Mode - Dark Mode for the default Minecraft UIs!
• Cyber Optics - Sci-Fi resource pack.
• Soartex - Smooth resource pack with mod support.
• Faithful - Smooth textures for a furbished default look.
• Continuum - A realistic shader pack.
• Chocapic13 - A realistic and configurable shader pack.
• Sonic Ether - Pathracing and other realistic shader packs.
• Sildur - Shader packs even implementing Minecraft 1.16's built-in API.
• Potato - A very lightweight shader pack for older or restrained PCs.
• ESBE 2G - A shader pack for Bedrock Edition.
• Paper - Miscellaneous patches for Spigot and BungeeCord providing better performance and more configuration options.
• Glowstone - Formerly known as Spout and BukkitContrib. Spigot Server alternative written from scratch with performance similar to Paper.
• Spigot - CraftBukkit's successor providing support for the Bukkit API.
• Sponge - Minecraft Server providing support for the Sponge API and is extensible to the Forge API and Bukkit API.
• Mohist - A server implementing the Forge and Bukkit API.
• Thermos - A server implementing the Forge and Bukkit API for 1.7.10.
• KCauldron - A server implementing the Forge and Bukkit API for 1.7.10.
• Cauldron - Formerly known as MCPC+. The original server implementing the Forge and Bukkit API.
• PowerNukkit - A powerful fork of Nukkit.
• Nukkit/NukkitX - A Bedrock Edition Server providing support for plugins supporting the Nukkit API.
• PocketMine - A Bedrock Edition Server providing support for basic plugins.
• Tabula - Minecraft Mod that faciliates creating 3D Models.
• Mod Coder Pack - Tool for properly decompiling Minecraft.
• BON 2stars154 - A rewrite of the Bearded Octo Nemesis project with support for ForgeGradle.
• Bearded Octo Nemesisstars129 - Tool for deobfuscating with support for SRG mappings and especially the Mod Coder Pack.
• vuestic-adminstars7.9k - Vue Admin Dashboard built with Vue 3 and vuestic-ui.
• Iploka — IP to Geolocation API - Forever free plan for developers with 10k requests per month limit.
• gistars2 - An Elixir wrapper for GraphicsMagick command line.
• RareRooms - 3D virtual rooms for NFT collections.
• ClipBoardMonitor - Monitor clipboard changes, show tooltip of word count for text or a temporary GUI for pictures.
• Vue.js SPA: Build a Powerful E-Commerce App
• htmly - Databaseless Blogging Platform (Flat-File Blog). (Demo, Source Codestars696) GPL-2.0 PHP
• Z-Push - Implementation of Microsoft’s ActiveSync protocol. (Source Code) AGPL-3.0 PHP
• Zipline - A lightweight, fast and reliable file sharing server that is commonly used with ShareX, offering a react-based Web UI and fast API. (Source Codestars69) MIT Nodejs
• ERPNext - Free open source ERP system. (Source Codestars8.3k) GPL-3.0 Python
• liteshortstars50 - User-friendly, actually lightweight, and configurable URL shortener. (Demo) MIT Python
• fzf-utilsstars0 - Provides functions to kill proceses and find in path with fzfstars36.6k.
• 🍓 Icings/Partitionable pluginstars3 - Partitionable associations allowing for basic limiting per group.
• Leon - Open-source personal assistant who can live on your server. (Source Codestars7.5k) MIT Node.js
• calibre-zaw-sourcestars3 - Calibre - E-book management source for zawstars498
• lishstars0 - A casual theme. No roughness, just smooth. Includes git, user@host, last command exit status, current directory, current time and root status decorators.
• Vue.js Articles - Assorted Vue 2 and 3 tutorials and articles.
• Best vue.js Courses On YouTube - Handpicked list of best Vue.js tutorials on YouTube
• vuestic-uistars535 - A Vue.js 3.0 UI customizable UI Framework.
• TFSecstars2.7k - A static analysis tool for infrastucture as code (Terraform).
• Tails OS - Tails is a portable operating system that protects against surveillance and censorship.
• Awesome Security Talks & Videosstars3.2k - A curated list of awesome security talks, organized by year and then conference.
• Test-Driven Development With Python And Django (1.11)

• Cloud Carbon Footprint - An open source tool that provides visibility and tooling to measure, monitor and reduce public cloud carbon emissions. It supports multiple cloud providers including AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, and displays energy and carbon emission metrics in a dashabord, command line interface or exportable to CSV.
• mailvalidator.io - Verify 300 emails/month for free, real-time API with bulk processing available
• Compoer Require Checkerstars570 - CLI tool to analyze composer dependencies and verify that no unknown symbols are used in the sources of a package.
• Composer Unusedstars674 - A CLI Tool to scan for unused composer packages.
• 🔧 Firebase Extension for Full-Text Searchstars20 - Extension to add full-text search in Firestore, by syncing the data to Typesensestars5.5k - an OSS alternative to Algolia.
• Discrete Differential Geometry - Keenan Crane
• CaptainHookstars519 - An easy-to-use and flexible Git hook library.
• DecimalObjectstars7 - A value object to handle decimals/floats easily and more precisely.
• altair
• vue-sweet-calendarstars25 - A simple and sweet vue.js calendar
• How to Deploy a REST API in Kubernetes
• jmeter-as-codestars11 - Simple wrapper for JMeter to write and execute JMeter tests with Java.
• emacs (cowboyd)stars0 - Make Emacs the default for CLI operations like editing git commit messages; set up handy aliases.
• emacs (flinner)stars0 - Uses the Emacs daemon capability, allowing the user to quickly open frames, whether they are opened in a terminal via a ssh connection, or X frames opened on the same host.
• openapi-python-clientstars180 - Generate modern FastAPI Python clients (via FastAPI) from OpenAPI.

• Artifactory - An artifact repository that supports numerous package formats like Maven, Docker, Cargo, Helm, PyPI, CocoaPods, and GitLFS. Incudes package scanning tool XRay and CI/CD tool Pipelines (formerly Shippable) with a free tier of 2,000 CI/CD minutes per month.
• packagecloud.io — Easy to use repository hosting for: Maven, RPM, DEB, PyPi, NPM, and RubyGem packages (has free tier).
• VKtracer - universal and easy-to-use profiler for Vulkan.
• cqcstars332 ⚠️ - Check your code quality for js, jsx, vue, css, less, scss, sass and styl files.
• imhotepstars214 ⚠️ - Comment on commits coming into your repository and check for syntactic errors and general lint warnings.
• include-gardenerstars52 ⚠️ - A multi-language static analyzer for C/C++/Obj-C/Python/Ruby to create a graph (in dot or graphml format) which shows all #include relations of a given set of files.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Platforms and Software Resources

Environmental and Climate Planning Tools and Platforms
nodes.itemHTML: • HAZUS - FEMA's Hazus Program provides standardized tools and data for estimating risk from earthquakes, floods, tsunamis, and hurricanes. Risk assessment resources and tools from the Hazus program are always freely available and transparently developed.
• zsh-not-vimstars0 - Provides a function that automatically shames the user for forgetting they weren't in vim.
• HarperDb — Serverless cloud database, with dynamic schema based on JSON, 3000 IOPS with 1GB storage
• Evidentlystars681 - Interactive reports to analyze machine learning models during validation or production monitoring.
• DreamLink - Share files easily and quickly on the decentralized network. Sourcestars7
• Summitstars40 - A python package for optimizing chemical reactions using machine learning (contains 10 algorithms + several benchmarks).
• Clovery - Integrate all your favorite Google services tightly with your Mac, let you access these services quickly and work more productively.
• Responsively - A must-have devtool for web developers for quicker responsive web development.
• NixDB - A database with Nix packages at all versions, from all channels.
• Detect Secretsstars1.9k - Yelp - An aptly named module for (surprise, surprise) detecting secrets within a code base.
• composer2nixstars60 - Generate Nix expressions to build composer packages.
• composition-c4stars3 - Support for building composer packages from a composer.lock (using IFD).
• nix-phpsstars5 - Flake containing old and unmaintained PHP versions (intended for CI use).
• crystalgstars31 - A Generic Algorithm Library
• oqstars137 - A performant, and portable jq wrapper to facilitate the consumption and output of formats other than JSON; using jqstars19.4k filters to transform the data
• queryitstars16 - A setupless terminal based SQL query runner
• HardWirestars15 - A compile-time non-intrusive dependency injection system
• mochistars19 - Authentication shard inspired by Devise supporting: Authenticable, Confirmable, Invitable & more
• motion.crstars39 - Object oriented frontend library for Amber
• tourmalinestars95 - Telegram bot framework with an API loosely based on telegraf.js
• burocracia.crstars21 - burocracia.cr the dependecyless shard to validate, generate and format Brazilian burocracias such as CPF, CNPJ and CEP
• avramstars112 - A database wrapper for reading, writing, and migrating Postgres databases
• mosquitostars151 - Redis backed periodic and ad hoc job processing
• FaaStRuby - Serverless Software Development Platform for Ruby and Crystal
• secrets-envstars6 - Extends ENV module to read values injected by docker / kubernetes secrets and other orchestration tools
• mollie.crstars12 - Mollie Payments API wrapper (Creditcard, PayPal, Apple Pay, Sofort, Klarna, ...)
• crystallinestars153 - Crystalline is an implementation of the Language Server Protocol written in and for the Crystal Language
• GTFS-Hubstars8 - Community tested, probably quality/content enhanced, partially merged or filtered GTFS-feeds of (currently German) transport agencies. Maintained by MITFAHR|DE|ZENTRALE.
• bureau-parrotstars0 - Based on bureau. Includes git decorations.
• longsilvernstars0 - Includes git and compact pwd decorations.
• Vectornator: Design Software - The Most Intuitive and Precise Illustration Software in the Galaxy.
• Raycast - Raycast lets you control your tools with a few keystrokes. It’s designed to keep you focused.

• pointcloudset - Python library for efficient analysis of large datasets of point clouds recorded over time.
    • GitHub repository :octocat:stars6
• TikZBlog - Step-by-Step Tutorials about How to Draw Illustrations in LaTeX.
• TheTechRobostars0 - Hobbyist Python 3.x developer who corrects grammar so much he loses friends.
• Polish Git Cheat Sheet
• pydiogmentstars46 :octocat:stars46 📦 - Audio Data Augmentation.
• spafestars128 :octocat:stars128 📦 - Python library for features extraction from audio files.
• PullToRefreshLayout ★134stars228 - [DEPRECATED] Pull To Refresh a ScrollView or ListView in Xamarin.Forms.
